business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial property portfolio with office and mercantile occupancies

coverages_discussed.notes: Current statement of values lists 8 Texas locations with total insured value of 314984000, including building, contents, and business income values. Modifications note updated TIV per appraisal effective 2026-03-15.

document_info.document_type: Excel statement of values and modifications schedule

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Schedule includes 8 Texas commercial property locations: office and mercantile occupancies in Dallas, Houston, Plano, Fort Worth, and Southlake. Construction types include Fire Resistive, Masonry Non-Combustible, and Non-Combustible. All listed locations are sprinklered.

concerns: Schedule notes an added warehouse facility and a deleted/closed location, but the provided current location schedule lists only the 8 displayed locations.
Total insured values were updated per appraisal effective 2026-03-15.
positives: Portfolio consists of commercial office and mercantile properties in Texas.
Most listed buildings were constructed from 2001 onward, with the oldest listed building built in 1995.
